transcript.text:
That's 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, and 8...!
(Today's mukbang surprised so many people) I won't believe it unless I see it
This is just unbelievable
(Been a while since we ordered all the menus!) Whoa, they all look so delicious
(One more thing, this restaurant was in business for 70 years...)
(Eating deliciously...)
(Finds it amazing...)
(Eating deliciously again...)
(Surprised again...)
(At peace...)
(Worried)
(At peace...)
(Worried)
(Still can't believe it even if she saw it...) It's just unbelievable
(Only Tzuyang is at peace today...)
(Let's start the mukbang right away then!)

(A restaurant with 70 years of history...)
Hello, everyone
I'm here today at Ojang-dong
for some naengmyeon* *Cold noodles
I heard that there's a famous naengmyeon* restaurant here *Cold Noodles
They started running the place since 1953
That's 70 years of history!
So this is going to be a legit Hamheung-style Cold Buckwheat Noodles
(Located at Jung-gu)
('Ojang-dong Heungnamjip')
They've been running this place for 4 generations now
(Let's get right to it) Let's head inside and try it
(Arrived on the 2nd floor!) Nice to meet you
How can she fit all that in her stomach?! LOL
(She's the second former owner!)
Can you really eat a lot?

(For sure X 999 times) Yeap heheheh
(And she's the younger sister of the former owner)
Then the current owner is...
(she's at the counter downstairs)
(The 4th owner is at the hospital to meet the newborn baby!)
There was this guy who ate the most
He had 5 bowls then
(Oh, 5 bowls eh...?)
She'll definitely do more than 5
I once had 20 ramyuns before!
- (Really?!) - My goodness
But the cold noodles will be different
(Scanning the menu!) We got 5 menus here
(That's 70 years of history right there) Raw fish salad with boiled beef, and dumplings!
I'll just get everything on the menu
(Let's go!) Just everything

Ma'am!!
I'll have everything on the menu!!
(Let's see...)
So it's 8 total!
LOL...
(Order up)
(+Spicy naengmyeon w/ raw fish)
(+Spicy naengmyeon w/ beef)
(+Mixed naengmyeon)
(+Mul* naengmyeon) *Water/broth
(+Hot pot noodles)
(+Raw fish salad)
(+Boiled beef slices)
(+Handmade dumplings)
(Order received) Total of 8
(And that's one meal...?) All at once?

All at once
(Knows Tzuyang) She can eat more than that!
(Never seen Tzuyang before) That can't be possible
(So while they're discussing, let's check out the menu...)
(These naengmyeons have 70 years of history)
(Time to check them out up close)
(Mixed naengmyeon)
(Spicy naengmyeon w/ raw fish)
(Spicy naengmyeon w/ beef)
(Mul* naengmyeon) *Water/broth
(Hot pot noodles)
(Boiled beef slices)
(Raw fish salad)
(Handmade dumplings)
(The whole thing on the menu is done preparing!)
(Let's go!)

Thank you!
Whoa, beef slices!
And here's the dumpling!
- That's cold noodles with raw fish - Raw fish naengmyeon
That's mul* naengmyeon! *Water/broth
This is a lot...!
(The table is full) I ran out of space
- (That really is something...!) - I ran out of space
(Rearranging the table...)
(Now it's all organized)
(That's just heaps of food...)
Just seeing it makes me full...
This ain't her first rodeo lol
(Knows Tzuyang) She'll eat them in no time!
(Let's dig in!) All the food looks so delicious
So this one's mixed naengmyeon

That's spicy naengmyeon w/ beef
Raw fish! I think this is the naengmyeon w/ raw fish
That's hot pot noodles
And this one's mul naengmyeon
we got boiled beef, dumplings and
raw fish as well
You're practically eating more than
the traditional wrestlers lol
(Tzuyang > Traditional wrestlers)
I'll start with the one with raw fish!
It's got an egg on the top like this
The noodles here look thicker
than the usual
(It's thicker than the ones in other restaurants..!)
I'll add vinegar and mustard
after I get a bite of it

(Let's get its original taste!) I'll season it after I get a bite
Thanks for the food!
(And there's the cold beef broth!) Whoa, thank you
Let's add this to moisten it up
That's better
The proper way to eat it is not cutting it
(Will try to keep my manners then...!)
But if you do, that's when you drink the broth
LOL
(Gulp)
I made it!! LOL
This is different from the usual spicy noodles
We have our own secrets for making it
It's thicker than other restaurants
and the noodles have more black color
because we got squid ink in it

That's not a secret anymore...!
(Former owner) (I'll let go just this time...)
The noodles are really chewy
and the seasoning is great...
It's got a lot of spice that makes it savory
The chewy texture is just on point...
Raw fish salad!
It's different from being tough
It's tender and crunchy at the same time!
It tastes really fresh
(Crunch!)
Just like cartilages
Let's get more raw fish into the bowl!
This is great! I don't think I have to add the seasoning
But I should get some in there
A bit of sesame oil...

Oops, that's mustard...
(A bit by bit!) A bit of sesame oil and vinegar
(Splash) Oh my goodness!!
Oh, but I think the sesame oil will cover it
This totally brings out a different flavor!
(Getting the whole in at one bite!)
(But no one told her to do that)
(Cleared the first bowl!)
It's really different from other noodles
It's got this traditional and unique flavor!
(Boiled beef) See how tender this is?
Let's dip it in the sauce
(Can't get any better...!) That was great, it even smells great too!
That's the center heel of the beef shank
(No wonder it's good) Oh, I see
The beef here is classy as well

I bet eating it with
(The ultimate combo...!) raw fish salad will make it great!
The fish in this raw skate salad
is more tender than other places as well
(Savoring the dish properly...)
A sip of warm broth!
Next up, it's handmade dumpling!
Let's see...
We only use shoulder meat for that one...
LOLOLOL
(The former owner) (I'll see you after this is done... :-/ )
It's really full of ingredients
Savory
and moist at the same time
Spicy naengmyeon w/ beef
But where's the beef?

(Heaps of beef are hidden inside the noodles...!) Oh! The meat is inside the noodles! That's something!
I guess the chewiness makes it harder to mix it
(Found it!) You see the meat in here?
(What a twist) That was a surprise!
The real secret is the soy sauce
(Not again!)
(Exposing the secret recipe wholeheartedly...)
(It's got a splash of soy sauce!) That's the key
Oh, really?
I gotta try it then
That's great...!
The savoriness is just out of this world
(The soy sauce just makes everything perfect...!) Once you mix it, you don't need more seasoning
The noodles are...
just super-duper chewy
It's great

I'll get vinegar
(+ Vinegar)
(+ Sesame oil)
A bit of mustard
(+A little dash)
(Satisfied) Perfect
(This one is really good)
(A bite of it wrapped with beef slice...!)
Ma'am!!
What was the price of this dish when you started?
800 won
800 won?!
(800 hwan* to be exact!)
800 hwan?
I've never heard of hwan!
(From 1953 to 1962, hwan is Korea's old currency!) Korea started to use the 'won' currency in 1962

(Since this place started in 1953, they used hwan before!)
(A living legend indeed...) That's amazing
We were models before!
She was the first woman to be on the bill!
(Model? On the bill...??)
("We're the mother and son on the 100 hwan bill") (The 2nd owner is a living legend, a GOAT for sure..!)
(Not much different from her beauty now)
(Cleared spicy naengmyeon w/ beef!)
(Straight to hot pot noodles...!) This looks great! Not sure if I tried this kind though
It's really great for hangovers!
(Can't say no to it then...LOLOLOL)
Whoa, this dish
the starch from the noodles
really levels up the chewiness
Even chewier than cold noodles!
(Trying with radish kimchi is recommended!)

(Recommendation taken...) A piece of kimchi, raw fish, boiled meat!
(That's just crazy...!!) That looks awesome
With that combo, you got no choice
but to order drinks again lol
(Of course, soju is a must for this kind of dish...LOLOL)
It's delicious!
The closest thing is the glass noodles
But it's different from that too
(Got no hangover, but still drinking the broth)
The savoriness of broth is on the next level!
Told you she can eat all of it!
She's got only 2 more bowls to go LOL
The guy that I mentioned
(The official record of the restaurant) he ate just 5 bowls but
he didn't order any side dishes as she did!
That's just amazing..

I never tried anything like this before
And you've never seen one like her before?
(Of course...) Yeap
She's so pretty, glad she's enjoying the food
Thank you
A bit of soy sauce!
Next up, mul naengmyeon!
I can taste a bit of special soy sauce
in this broth made from beef
It's got a simple but savory taste
It's got a bit more seasoning than Pyeongyang-style Cold Buckwheat Noodles
(+Mustard)
(+Vinegar)
How much sugar do I have to put in?
A spoonful will do
(+Sugar)

(Naengmyeon with sugar...?) I've never tried sugar with cold noodles
(She's really about to finish...!!)
Whoa, this one's great too...!
I gotta get one myself downstairs!
(Seeing her eat makes me crave it...)
(Huh? Where did all the noodles go...?)
(Cleared mul naengmyeon)
(She came closer to see Tzuyang's magic LOL) That's a lot, really
So I get to hold the record now?!
(No need to say it) Of course!!
I didn't think she'll finish though!
- We serve - I'm stunned!
large portions!
Yeah, I could tell it while I was eating
(The 2nd former owner is 85 yrs old!)
(Her sister is 80!)

Why'd you lie about your age LOL
I just forgot to count one haha
(They both are adorable)
I saw your interview that you digest in 15 minutes
(How did he know?!) You saw that video too?
(True fan!) I told you I'm a big fan!
This one's the mixed one
It's got both meat and raw fish in it
That's a lot
(Getting the leftover salad into the bowl...!
(I really love it, hehe)
(Adding broth to the mixed naengmyeon!) Shall I get some broth in here?
She really did eat all of them! My gosh
Whoa...
You didn't drink much Coke today
She usually eats 4 to 5 cans

(Meet-and-greet at naengmyeon restaurant...) You really know me so well!!
(Boiled beef and raw fish combo for finish...!) Almost done
(Just look at her go...!)
(Cleared mixed naengmyeon!)
Last piece, dumpling!
(Literally inhaling the soup...)
Eggs for dessert!
'Ojang-dong Heungnamjip' ALL CLEAR!)
Whooaaaa
That's amazing, a round of applause!!
(You deserve it!!) Gotta clap for this one, really
Nicely done
This kind of event never happened before!
My gosh, she's scaring me a bit too...
Thanks for the delicious food! I really enjoyed it!
Can you stand up for a second?

Yeah? Why?
Thought you'd be too full to stand up...!
(How strange, she's totally fine)
I really enjoyed the noodles with 70 years of tradition
And it really was a meaningful time meeting the former owners!
Thanks again
for another delicious meal!
We'll take two pictures
3, 2, 1
Thank you
Thanks for the food
